name: CEREBRAL CAVERNOUS MALFORMATION
definition: CAVERNOUS ANGIOMA OF BRAIN = CAVERNOUS HEMANGIOMA = CAVERNOMA benign vascular hamartoma of immature blood vessels + intralesional hemorrhage

demographics.Path: well-circumscribed nodule of honeycomblike dilated endothelial lined spaces separated

discriminating_features: usually contain blood degradation products of different stages
slow blood flow in vascular channels
low-attenuation areas due to thrombosed portions

general: usually contain blood degradation products of different stages
slow blood flow in vascular channels
CECT: low-attenuation areas due to thrombosed portions
typically popcorn appearance with bright lobulated center on T1WI + T2WI
well-defined area of mixed signal intensity centrally (= "mulberry"-shaped lesion) with a
increased signal intensity (= extracellular methemoglobin / slow blood flow /
decreased intensity (= deoxyhemoglobin / intracellular methemoglobin / hemosiderin /
surrounded by hypointense rim (= hemosiderin) on T2WI
